description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, both with expansive glass facades and light-colored exterior walls. A large swimming pool dominates the outdoor area, bordered by a spacious patio and a covered section that could serve as an outdoor lounge or carport. The main building appears to have floor-to-ceiling windows, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The roof is flat and extends over the patio, offering shade and architectural interest. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and geometric simplicity.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass facades, a spacious patio, and a prominent swimming pool, all arranged in a minimalist, geometric layout.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the long, horizontal layout, the large swimming pool, and the main building with its flat roof and glass facade.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the depth of the pool area and the covered patio or carport adjacent to the main structure.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the full length of the house, the pool, and the secondary structure, with the flat roof and glass walls clearly visible.
description_view_3: This opposite side view focuses on the pool and the smaller covered area, with the main building set further back.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with large glass doors, no visible steps, and a flat overhang providing shade
